name: NEXUS — Personal Dashboard
description: Replace your new tab page with NEXUS — a personal dashboard with widgets for calendar, weather, stocks, music, tasks, and more.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; connect-src https://nexus-api.lj-buchmiller.com https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com;
